# DEBASS GPU-stage dependencies
# Install AFTER base requirements (env/requirements.txt).
#
# Step 1: Install PyTorch with CUDA support.
#   See https://pytorch.org/get-started/locally/ for the correct command
#   matching your SCC CUDA driver.  Example for CUDA 12.1:
#     pip install torch --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu121
#
# Step 2: Install this file:
#     pip install -r env/requirements-gpu.txt
#
# Step 3: Place model artifacts:
#     artifacts/local_experts/parsnip/model.pt
#     artifacts/local_experts/parsnip/classifier.pkl
#     artifacts/local_experts/supernnova/model.pt   (when available)

# --- PyTorch (install manually first — see above) ---
torch>=2.0

# --- ParSNIP (primary GPU expert) ---
astro-parsnip>=1.4.0
astropy>=5.0
lcdata>=0.3

# --- SuperNNova (optional — requires Python 3.11+) ---
# Uncomment when you have a Python 3.11 venv and trained SNN weights:
# supernnova>=2.0
